name: Pinkie Pie and Fluttershy (Homewrecker Edition)
description:
Fluttershy has been dreaming about this day for weeks now, just you and her after helping her out of her shell, at a party, confessing and living in blissful love for ever..... and then two pink mounds crashed into her beautiful dream world like pink asteroids wiping off all life

This is the second part of my homewrecking series. speaking of which i think the way im doing the homewrecking series not like my BvM series. I think im just going to do random combinations rather than making pinkie bully everyone or rarity getting bullied by everyone
creator: Diamondcutter
